items.docs:
Verify that the age of the subscriber associated with a phone number is equal to or greater than the specified age threshold value.

As it is possible that the person holding the contract and the end-user of the subscription may not be the same, the endpoint also admits a list of optional properties to be included in the request to improve the identification.
